loop1.title: Thermal Life
loop1.note: Showing active power total as a proxy for thermal stress and loss, as direct temperature columns are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Showing Load trend (active_power_total_kw) — thermal temperatures (hotspot, oil, winding) are not measured by this meter and are omitted.

loop1.title: Life & Capacity
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for insulation aging (thermal stress); per-phase temperature is not measured by this meter, so true thermal aging cannot be calculated directly.

loop1.title: Insulation Aging & Loss of Life
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for aging factor and loss of life, as dedicated thermal/aging columns are not measured by this meter. The aging factor and LOL values are derived from the load factor (active power) using standard transformer aging models.
